step.name: collect-md
step.action: List every changed `.md`/`.mdx` file plus their reverse dependencies.

step.name: build-graphs
step.input: Files + slug index + site URL map
step.action: Build heading-anchor map + valid slug set + valid path set.

step.name: scan
step.action: Walk every link; classify orphan if unresolved.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Verdict=fail if any present; post per-file remediation comment to PR.
